"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.transformFile = void 0; exports.transformFileAsync = transformFileAsync; exports.transformFileSync = transformFileSync; const transformFile = exports.transformFile = function transformFile(filename, opts, callback) { if (typeof opts === "function") { callback = opts; } callback(new Error("Transforming files is not supported in browsers"), null); }; function transformFileSync() { throw new Error("Transforming files is not supported in browsers"); } function transformFileAsync() { return Promise.reject(new Error("Transforming files is not supported in browsers")); } 0 && 0; //# sourceMappingURL=transform-file-browser.js.map
